facebook.caption:
332 reviews. 4.5 stars. And somehow this café stays under the radar in Phú Quốc.

Buddy Ice Cream & Cafe on Đường Bạch Đằng is the kind of spot locals keep coming back to. Ice cream, coffee, chill vibe. No resort markup, no tourist trap pricing.

Next time you're near the waterfront, stop in. You'll see why 332 people rated it this high.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Scoop in hand, 4.5 stars on the board. Buddy Ice Cream & Cafe on Đường Bạch Đằng earns every one of them. Cold, quick, local. This is your afternoon sorted.
